title: CommonsV2 Group C: 20Hz server batching + LLM debounce

log.context: CommonsV2 Group C: 20Hz server batching + LLM debounce

Both fixes applied and pushed. Here's a summary:

**What was found and fixed:**

**Fix 1 — Client-side move throttling (`/mnt/data/labs/commons-v2/src/main.ts`)**
The server's game loop was already correctly running at 20Hz (50ms `setInterval`). The problem was on the client: `sendMove` was called every animation frame (~60fps) whenever the player held a movement key — the only guard was `inputSeq` deduplication, but `inputSeq` increments every frame while moving, so it was sending ~60 messages/...(truncated)
